ModMetaData.name: Do More Research
ModMetaData.author: TheFarawayDev
ModMetaData.description:
A highly optimized, smart auto-research selector. Prevents idle researchers by automatically queuing the next best research when one finishes.
Features: - Smart Auto-Select: Automatically chooses the next logical tech based on your current era. - Tech Level Penalties: Properly accounts for cost penalties of advanced eras. - Strict Era Progression: (Optional) Forces your colony to research all available tech in your current era before moving on. - Shift-Click Focus: Shift-Click any research tab to exclusively focus on tech from that tab until it's finished! - Optimized: Uses intelligent caching, checking DefDatabase only when necessary, preventing late-game lag. - Fully compatible with overhaul mods like Yet Another Research Tree and ResearchPowl.
